name: Canon Speedlite Transmitter ST-E3-RT (Ver. 3)
description: Take full advantage of all the features on compatible flashes with the third iteration of the Canon Speedlite Transmitter ST-E3-RT.

features.Key Features: Wireless Rear Curtain Synchronization | 5 Groups or 15 Speedlites, Range: 98.4' | 8 Custom Functions, 3 Personal Functions | LCD Information Panel, Backlit Controls
features.What's In The Box: Canon Speedlite Transmitter ST-E3-RT (Ver. 3) | Soft Case
